_seam_note: Content-graph IR: the panel pipeline WRITES this (wiki_to_comic.py projects it from the wiki graph on gate-pass); build_comic.py INLINES it into comic/index.html (no runtime fetch). image_path currently points at seeds/ as placeholder until panels are generated (then -> panels/SXX_panel_aNN.png).
_crop_note: crop is an OBJECT (review blocker #1): {shape, position:[x,y] object-position 0..1 focal point, zoom>=1}. shape drives container aspect at layout time; position+zoom frame the 16:9 source inside the (square/hero/wide) container WITHOUT re-generating other ratios — point position at the subjects so square cells never slice faces. Real generated panels are composed-to-shape so heavy zoom is rarely needed.

title.zh: ARIS — 我把那 24 小时交出去了
title.en: ARIS — I Handed Over Those 24 Hours

tagline.en: While you're away, the research carries on.

defaults._text_mode_options: html (HTML/CSS owns the whole bubble — design-locked default) | baked (text drawn into the image — RE-OPENED by user, pending the AI-baked-text duel once image_gen cools) | code (deterministic code-drawn bubble). per-panel override allowed via panels.<id>.text_mode.
defaults._locale_note: EN default for the international GitHub audience; zh first-class via toggle. text_fits gate must pass BOTH; size safe-zones to the longer (usually EN).

title.zh:
我把那 24 小时
交出去了

tag.zh: 离投稿，还有二十四小时。

narration.zh: 23:58，她按下 Enter，把最后 24 小时整个交了出去。ARIS 的自主交接从这一刻生效——此后每一个错误都没有人类兜底，得它自己抓出来。
narration.en: At 23:58 she hits Enter and hands over the entire final 24 hours. ARIS's autonomous hand-off begins here — from now on no human catches its mistakes; it must catch its own.

beat_title.zh: 通胀审计 · 全片高潮

pages.skill: experiment-audit :: sanitizer ≠ validator → raw re-eval → WARN_corrected

narration.zh: schema-first 初看 +6.2。但 adversarial 审计发现评估器偷用了 JSON sanitizer 补键——纯 raw 重评后只剩 +1.4。效应真，范围缩小：诚实但不杀稿。
narration.en: schema-first looked like +6.2. But the adversarial audit found the evaluator secretly ran a JSON sanitizer — on a raw re-eval only +1.4 holds. Real but narrowed: honest, not killed.

tag.en: While you're away, the research carries on.

condition.identity_desc: the researcher (she): black rectangular glasses slipping down her nose, dark short hair, plain black tee — exactly as in the reference
condition.characters: the researcher slumped at her desk, chin propped on one hand, EXHAUSTED, staring at a dark failed-run log on the laptop; her backpack slumped on the chair back; NO other characters (the duo does not exist yet in this panel)
condition.scene: late-night warm bedroom-study (density target cal_S12): Edison desk lamp over a desk buried in printed papers with red-pen margins; bookshelf spines legible 'LLM DECODING' / 'STRUCTURED OUTPUTS' / 'EVALS FIRST'; a hand-written TODO note 'better masks / schema locks / evals'; the laptop screen shows a DARK failed-experiment log (do NOT draw any aris command — that is the next panel); on the desk corner HER 'ML RESEARCH' mug HOT with two steady steam plumes (the film's temperature origin); a bright sticky note 'dllm-schema-keyword-first' on the monitor bezel (decorative, small); outside the window a COOL blue night-city skyline contrasts the warm room. The technical figure from image #1 (the amber DDL countdown chip 'DDL T-24:00:00') sits ON the desk beside the laptop as a small physical widget. COMPOSITION CONSTRAINT: this panel doubles as the COVER base — keep the LEFT 55% of the frame LOW-DETAIL (soft warm gradients, no text, no busy props) for the HTML title overlay; place ALL baked anchors (DDL chip, sticky notes, laptop, her) in the RIGHT half.

text.zh: 这一轮交给 ARIS 了，我去睡了。
text.en: This round's on ARIS. I'm going to sleep.

caption.zh: 23:58，她把最后 24 小时整个交了出去。
caption.en: At 23:58 she hands over the entire final 24 hours.

condition.identity_desc: LEFT of the ref sheet = the researcher (black glasses, dark short hair, black tee); RIGHT of the ref sheet = the ARIS duo (blue-hoodie executor: brown hair NO beard; green-hoodie reviewer: dark hair WITH beard)
condition.characters: the researcher on the WARM left side, fingers just lifted off the Enter key, tired but relieved, rising from the chair; on the DARK right side the duo wakes — the blue executor leaps with BOTH arms thrown up in his HIGHEST jump of the whole film (bounce MAX, the arc's origin), the green reviewer lands steady, arms crossed, eyes already locked on the terminal card
condition.scene: ONE panel split diagonally along the laptop screen into two worlds (ART_BIBLE §0.5 seam): LEFT half = the same warm bedroom at night (Edison lamp, the SAME 'ML RESEARCH' mug still HOT with two plumes — same heat as S01, no higher; a hand-written note 'submit / sleep'; backpack on the chair; cool blue night-city out the window); RIGHT half = the laptop screen torn open into the #0A0E27 dark-cyber void (neon grid floor, faint wiki glow, idea ghosts). The technical figure from image #1 (the HAND-OFF terminal card: '$ aris run --task dllm-schema-keyword-first --deadline 24h' + green 'ARIS ONLINE' stamp + amber DDL chip 'T-24:00:00') RIDES THE SEAM — half on her screen, half floating in the dark world (density target cal_S12 on both sides).

S12._condition: per-panel content-driven gen config: the engine feeds content_svg (rendered to PNG) as -i ref #1 + duo_canonical as #2; bubbles are BAKED into the prompt (text_mode=baked)

condition.scene: warm-lit pixel ML research lab at night. The back board/monitor shows the method diagram (random-mask row ends red exact_parse FAIL with 'span 跨边界切碎'; schema-keyword-first row ends green OK with 'span ⊆ schema') plus a small wandb exact_parse curve with an amber Δ +6.2 callout. FILL the warm room with legible storytelling props (density target = cal_S12): bookshelf spines 'LLM DECODING' / 'STRUCTURED OUTPUTS' / 'EVALS FIRST', a hand-drawn TODO note ('better masks ☐ / schema locks ☐ / evals ☑'), an open laptop showing real readable code 'def exact_parse(json_str, schema): ...', an 'ML RESEARCH' mug and a '</>' mug, a small potted plant, warm Edison desk lamps; a cool blue night-city skyline glows through the window behind the warm interior (warm room vs cool night = in-panel two-world contrast)

chibi_action.executor: warm foreground LOWER-LEFT, one arm thrust up in triumph pointing at the board, proud
chibi_action.reviewer: foreground LOWER-RIGHT, arms crossed, eyes narrowed, already glancing toward the code, skeptical

caption.zh: 看起来，去噪顺序就是全部故事。
caption.en: The unmask order looked like the whole story.

condition.scene: dark screen-lit AUDIT LAB at night. A laptop terminal shows the two-column code contrast — LEFT (red, THE BUG): score(json_sanitizer(out)) with '# default-fills malformed keys BEFORE scoring'; RIGHT (honest, green): json.loads + jsonschema.validate with '# raw, no repair'. FILL the dark cyber room with legible storytelling props (density target = cal_S12): a faint 'WIKI VOID' swirl glow + dark shelf spines 'JSON SCHEMA AUDIT' / 'EVAL INTEGRITY', a second monitor scrolling raw json.loads logs, a '</>' mug and a cooling coffee, neon-edged panels, one warm desk lamp breaking the cool gloom (cool cyber + warm accent)

chibi_action.reviewer: hunched at the terminal, finger jabbing the red sanitizer line
chibi_action.executor: leaning in over the shoulder, dawning-horror face, a single sweat drop

caption.zh: 评测器在判分前，先把错的修好了。
caption.en: The evaluator repaired the outputs before judging them.

condition.scene: a dark re-eval war-room at night. The center dashboard labeled HONEST RE-EVAL shows the inflated +6.2 visibly cracking and falling into a solid green +1.4, with the +4.8 dropping away labeled 'evaluator self-repair artifact'. FILL the dark cyber room with legible storytelling props (density target = cal_S12): a glowing 'RAW' toggle switch flipped on, secondary monitors scrolling raw json.loads re-eval logs, dark shelf spines 'EXPERIMENT AUDIT' / 'RESULT INTEGRITY', neon gridlines on the floor, a '</>' mug, one warm desk lamp accent against the cool cyber gloom

chibi_action.reviewer: flipping a RAW switch on the dashboard, composed
chibi_action.executor: watching the number collapse, humbled but not crushed

text.zh: 纯 raw 重评——真值是 +1.4。
text.en: Raw re-eval — the real number is +1.4.

caption.en: Real effect — but the scope narrowed.

condition.scene: a dark verdict chamber at night. A verdict card glows amber: WARN_corrected; the over-claim 'X is best' is struck through and narrows to '...best under an external validator'; a claim-ledger board shows the entry (claim_id / integrity=WARN_corrected / scope). FILL the dark cyber room with legible storytelling props (density target = cal_S12): dark shelf spines 'CLAIM AUDIT' / 'RESEARCH WIKI', a terminal showing the enforced re-run command, neon stamp-glow around the verdict card, a '</>' mug and a half-finished coffee, one warm desk lamp accent against the cool cyber gloom

chibi_action.reviewer: holding/stamping the WARN_corrected verdict, calm authority

text.en: Not killed — but write the scope.
